original_abstract: In the context of digital transformation, Blockchain technology offers a potential solution to the problems of interoperability, data privacy, and resource optimization. This innovative technology has the ability to address these challenges and radically revolutionize health systems. This document will examine the potential of blockchain technology in the healthcare sector and how it can be the key to overcoming current obstacles. The study follows the PRISMA methodology. The review included 10 studies that were selected based on their relevance to the application of Blockchain in healthcare. The studies were primarily focused on the development and implementation of Blockchain solutions in the health sector, with a particular emphasis on areas such as data security, supply chain management, and data sharing. A comprehensive overview of the current state of Blockchain applications in the health sector is provided, including the benefits and challenges associated with its implementation.
humanized_abstract: BLOCKCHAIN VS HEALTHCARE SYSTEMS: NEW ALTERNATIVE IN THE ERA OF DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION In order to solve the problem of interoperability, data protection and resource planning in digital transformation era, the emerging technology of Blockchain can be used in order to revolution health systems. This article aims to find out potential applications of Blockchain technology in the health care sector and how it could be used as a key for resolution of the current problems. Studies conducted according to PRISMA protocol, where 10 relevant studies that met the criteria for the application of Blockchain technology in the health care sector, were selected. Studies relating to the development and implementation of Blockchain technologies in the health sector have been mostly focused on the data encryption, health supply chain management and sharing data. This article will analyze in more detail the use of Blockchain technology in the health sector, as well as the opportunities and obstacles that they face.
